intro: Five strategy primitives drive the three live workflows. Equity entries are deterministic indicator-based; the wheel is a state-machine premium-seller; the news trader is the only LLM-mediated path.

rows: RSI(14), MACD line vs signal, EMA(20), 5-day return
RSI ∈ [55, 70] AND MACD > signal AND close > EMA20 AND 5d > 0
Stop = max(EMA20, entry × (1 − 5%)); TP = 2× R; max-hold 60 d (backtest)
Fixed-fractional Kelly: min(equity·0.5%/per-share-risk, equity·4.5%/entry); ROUND_DOWN to integer shares
Same as Momentum (currently disabled in router — PF 0.66 in sideways regime)
Conviction 0.4–0.9 from RSI position + MACD spread + relative-5d
RSI < 30 AND last < lower Bollinger band
close > prior 20-day high AND last_volume ≥ 1.5× 20d avg
Regime, VIX, sentiment, IV rank, earnings calendar, WSB spike
Phase ∈ {None, assigned} AND all preflight gates pass; pick contract by delta + DTE band
Take-profit at (1 − take_profit_pct) × credit; force-close at dte ≤ dte_force_close; roll if |delta| ≥ breach
Capped by allocation.options_max_pct + per-symbol concentration cap + sector cap (default 25 %)
Event class (regex), direction, novelty, primary-filing flag
LLM picks ENTER / SCALE_IN / REDUCE / EXIT / HEDGE / ESCALATE; else NO_TRADE
LLM-issued time-stop; required, fail-closed if missing

regime_router.intro: strategy_for_regime (strategy.py:168) decides which strategy fires given the live regime. MeanReversion is currently disabled across all regimes — PF 0.66 in sideways was losing.

callouts.body: screener.py:60 → 1d_return × 1.4 + relative_5d + min(vol_ratio, 3) × 2 — benchmark-relative against SPY 5-day move.
Idle → CSP-armed → Sold-Put → Assigned → CC-armed → Sold-Call → Called-Away → Idle. Rolls are self-loops on Sold-Put or Sold-Call when delta breaches and rolls_used < cap.
